title: Feed connector configuration
description: Fetches a single RSS/Atom feed and imports each entry as an FtM Article (metadata only) with provenance.

feed_url.title: Feed URL
feed_url.description: URL of the RSS 2.0 / RSS 1.0 / Atom 1.0 feed to fetch (over the SSRF guard).

max_items.title: Maximum items
max_items.description: Hard cap on the number of entries imported per run (bounds the import).

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Optional HTTP timeout for the feed fetch, in seconds.
